fields.name: onboardPorts
fields.description: Onboard ports

fields.name: adapterCards
fields.description: Adapter cards and their ports

fields.name: slots
fields.description: Physical hardware slots in the system, each containing one or more adapters.

fields.name: totalCount
fields.description: Total number of network ports reported for this node.

fields.name: networkPorts
fields.description: List of network ports on this node, sorted by port name.

fields.name: broadcastDomain
fields.description: The broadcast domain that contains this port. Broadcast domains group ports that share the same Layer 2 network and are used by ONTAP to automatically place and fail over LIFs.

fields.name: interfaceGroupOwner
fields.description: The name of the interface group that owns this port. Populated only when the port is a member of an interface group; null otherwise.

fields.name: ipspaceName
fields.description: The IPspace this port belongs to. IPspaces provide isolated networking namespaces within the cluster. Common values are 'Default' for data and management traffic and 'Cluster' for cluster interconnect traffic.

fields.name: link
fields.description: The current physical link state of the port (UP or DOWN).

fields.name: macAddress
fields.description: The hardware Media Access Control (MAC) address that uniquely identifies this network interface at Layer 2.

fields.name: maxTransmissionUnitBytes
fields.description: Maximum Transmission Unit size in bytes. Defines the largest IP packet the port can transmit without fragmentation. Standard Ethernet uses 1500 bytes; jumbo frames use 9000 bytes for improved throughput on storage traffic.

fields.name: port
fields.description: The name of the network port as reported by the node (e.g., e0a, e0b, a0a, e0a-200).

fields.name: role
fields.description: The traffic role assigned to this port, which determines the type of network communication it handles.

fields.name: speedAdministrativeMbps
fields.description: The configured port speed in Mbps. A value of 'auto' means the port negotiates speed automatically with the connected switch.

fields.name: speedOperationalMbps
fields.description: The current negotiated operating speed of the port in Mbps. A value of '0' typically indicates the link is down or the speed cannot be determined.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The physical or logical type of the network port.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Shelf model name

fields.name: endOfAvailability
fields.description: Shelf end of availability

fields.name: endOfHwSupport
fields.description: Shelf end of hardware support

fields.name: endOfSwSupport
fields.description: Shelf end of software support

fields.name: name
fields.description: Shelf module name

fields.name: endOfAvailability
fields.description: Shelf Module end of availability

fields.name: endOfHwSupport
fields.description: Shelf Module end of hardware support

fields.name: endOfSwSupport
fields.description: Shelf Module end of software support

fields.name: uuid
fields.description: Unique Identifier of the drive.

fields.name: serialNumber
fields.description: Serial number of the drive.

fields.name: mode
fields.description: Indicates the current mode of the drive.

fields.name: primaryPath
fields.description: Primary path to the drive.

fields.name: primaryPort
fields.description: Primary port to the drive.

fields.name: secondaryPath
fields.description: Secondary path to the drive.

fields.name: secondaryPort
fields.description: Secondary port to the drive.

fields.name: slot
fields.description: Slot number where the drive is located.

fields.name: firmwareRevision
fields.description: Revision level of the drive firmware.

fields.name: powerOnHours
fields.description: Cumulative amount of time in hours that a disk drive has been powered on and operational since it was last reset or initialized.

fields.name: vendor
fields.description: Vendor of the drive.

fields.name: hardwareModel
fields.description: The drive hardware model details.

fields.name: revolutionsPerMinute
fields.description: Spindle rotational speed (revolutions per minute) of the Drive, not applicable for solid-state(SSD / NVMe / Flash) models.

fields.name: capacity
fields.description: Drive capacity information including both configured and physical capacity details.

fields.name: totalCount
fields.description: Total number of drives.

fields.name: cursor
fields.description: Cursor of last element returned. Pass this to subsequent query to fetch the next set of results.

fields.name: drives
fields.description: List of drives.

fields.name: totalCount
fields.description: Total number of drive bays in the shelf enclosure.

fields.name: emptyCount
fields.description: Number of empty drive bays in the shelf enclosure.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The type of the system firmware.

fields.name: version
fields.description: The version of the system firmware.

fields.name: biosVersion
fields.description: The BIOS version of the system firmware.

fields.name: systemModel
fields.description: The system model associated with the firmware.

fields.name: driveModel
fields.description: The model of the drive firmware.

fields.name: version
fields.description: The version of the drive firmware.

fields.name: shelfName
fields.description: The name of the shelf associated with the firmware.

fields.name: shelfModuleName
fields.description: The name of the shelf module associated with the firmware.

fields.name: firmwareType
fields.description: The type of the shelf firmware.

fields.name: shelfModuleFirmwareVersion
fields.description: Marketed version of the shelf module firmware, e.g., 'IOM12.0311.SFW'.

fields.name: sysShelfModuleFirmwareVersion
fields.description: Firmware version of the shelf module, e.g., '0311'.

fields.name: fileType
fields.description: The type of the security file.

fields.name: version
fields.description: The version of the security file.

fields.name: fileType
fields.description: The type of the system file.

fields.name: version
fields.description: The version of the system file.

fields.name: qualifiedVersion
fields.description: Qualified version of the system.

fields.name: audits
fields.description: Audit trail of changes to the qualified version. It will have maximum 10 records from the latest events.

fields.name: fullVersionString
fields.description: OS version of the system.

fields.name: endOfVersionDetails
fields.description: OS end of version details of the system.

fields.name: currentVersion
fields.description: Current firmware version.

fields.name: recommendedVersion
fields.description: Recommended firmware version.

fields.name: postingDate
fields.description: Posting date of the recommended firmware version.

fields.name: currentVersion
fields.description: Current firmware version.

fields.name: recommendedVersion
fields.description: Recommended firmware version.

fields.name: postingDate
fields.description: Posting date of the recommended firmware version.

fields.name: autoUpdateEligible
fields.description: Flag to indicate if this current version is eligible for automatic firmware update.

fields.name: firmwareFiles
fields.description: A list of firmware files available for updating the firmware.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Firmware type.

fields.name: cloudInsightsApplications
fields.description: Cloud Insights Applications that monitor ONTAP storage controllers

fields.name: cloudInsightsHostCount
fields.description: Count of hosts monitored in Cloud Insights that are connected to the ONTAP storage controllers

fields.name: cloudInsightsVirtualMachineCount
fields.description: Count of virtual machines monitored in Cloud Insights that are created by the hypervisors running on the hosts

fields.name: vCenterCount
fields.description: Count of vCenter vSphere servers that manage the ONTAP storage controllers
